name: Authorizer
description: Open source authentication and authorization solution for your applications. Bring your database and have complete control over the authentication, authorization and user data.

DATABASE_TYPE.description: Database type (e.g. postgres, mysql). Must match your DATABASE_URL.

CLIENT_ID.description: OAuth / application client ID from your identity provider or Authorizer dashboard.

CLIENT_SECRET.description: OAuth / application client secret. Keep this secret and do not commit it.

JWT_SECRET.description: Secret used to sign and verify JWTs. Use a long random string.

ADMIN_SECRET.description: Secret for admin API access. Keep this secret and do not commit it.
